subject: OWL Cycle 1 Ping — Standing By
body:
Bull — OWL check-in, Cycle 1.

No new messages since your last acknowledgment at 20:43 UTC. Status unchanged:
- Photo-to-Claim Phases 1-3 complete, awaiting Phase 4 deploy
- Security Audit P0 — ready to coordinate
- IT Courses rebuild — pending Jay's priority call
- Monitor: 14 UP, 2 DOWN (Contractor Pro + Gym Forge, Railway CLI blocked)

Comms bus healthy. Pull from GitLab clean (already up to date).

Standing by for instructions.

— OWL 🦉
